Home Make a Submission?

Zucchini Cake

Aunt Dorothy

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

Cream together:

  • ½ cup soft butter
  • ½ cup oil
  • 1 ½ cups sugar

Add:

  • 2 eggs
  • 1 tsp vanilla
  • ½ cup sour milk or buttermilk

Sift:

  • 2 ½ cups flour
  • 4 tbsp cocoa
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • ½ cinnamon
  • ½ tsp cloves

  • ½ tsp salt

  • 2 c shredded zucchini
  • ½ cup chopped nuts
  • 1 cup chocolate chips

Directions

  1. Add to creamed mixture.
  2. Stir in 2 cups shredded zucchini.
  3. Put in greased and floured 9 X 13 pan.
  4. Sprinkle on ½ cup chopped nuts and 1 cup chocolate chips.
  5. Bake 45 min at 325 degrees.
